use_cases: Form submission and user actions across web applications
Call-to-action buttons in marketing and product interfaces
Interactive elements in dashboards and admin panels
ai_summary: A reusable Button component using Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority for variant management. Supports multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Follows shadcn/ui design patterns with Tailwind CSS, providing accessible focus states and disabled states. Ships with full TypeScript support and forwardRef for DOM manipulation.
